title: FHA Loans for First-Time Home Buyers in Florida (2026 Guide)

bodyHtml:
Home/FHA First-Time Home Buyer Florida
FHA First-Time Home Buyer Florida

FHA loans for first-time home buyers in Florida

Buying your first home in Florida? FHA loans let you start with just 3.5% down and flexible credit — and they pair with Florida assistance programs to make it even more affordable.

An FHA mortgage specialist will reach out shortly with your personalized Florida rate quote.

First-Time Buyers

Buying your first Florida home with an FHA loan

FHA loans are the most popular financing route for first-time buyers in Florida, and for good reason: they were designed to lower the barriers that keep renters from becoming owners. Instead of needing 20% down and pristine credit, you can buy with as little as 3.5% down and a 580 credit score.

Why first-time buyers choose FHA

Three features do the heavy lifting: a low 3.5% down payment, flexible credit guidelines, and the ability to use gift funds from family for your down payment. Sellers can also contribute up to 6% of the price toward your closing costs, which further reduces the cash you need at the table.

How much you really need

On a $350,000 Florida home, 3.5% down is $12,250. Add estimated closing costs (often 2%–5%), and many first-time buyers get in for well under $25,000 — and even less when down payment assistance or seller credits are involved.

Pair FHA with Florida assistance

FHA loans combine smoothly with Florida down payment assistance programs, which can cover part or all of your down payment and closing costs. This combination is what makes a first home realistic for many Floridians.

Your Path

Your first-home journey, step by step

04

Close & move in

Sign, get your keys, and start building equity in your first home.

Questions & Answers

Frequently asked questions

Do I have to be a first-time buyer to use an FHA loan in Florida?+
No. FHA loans are open to any qualified buyer. They're simply very popular with first-time buyers because of the low down payment and flexible credit requirements.
How much do I need to buy my first home with FHA in Florida?+
As little as 3.5% down — $12,250 on a $350,000 home — plus closing costs. Down payment assistance and seller credits can reduce your out-of-pocket cash further.
Can I use gift money for my FHA down payment?+
Yes. Your entire 3.5% down payment can come from a documented gift from a family member.
What credit score do first-time buyers need for FHA?+
580 or higher for the 3.5% down option. Scores of 500–579 may qualify with 10% down.
Can I combine FHA with Florida first-time buyer programs?+
Yes. FHA financing works alongside programs like Florida Hometown Heroes and local assistance to help cover down payment and closing costs.
